svg.text: CURRENT ’ STALE: source locale (RU) effective text changed after KK derived
STALE ’ REVIEW_REQUIRED: automated structural drift detected (BC024)
REVIEW_REQUIRED ’ CURRENT: human reconciliation + explicit confirm
UNKNOWN: legacy import, partial translation, or missing lineage metadata
Per locale block: preamble, item body, control, attachment (independent staleness possible)
Not a production enum  research states for OP-RES-006 architecture input
Aligns with Personnel Orders regenerate ’ override marked stale/review-required
Corpus: 12 partial_translation + 33 abbreviated_or_expanded intra-doc cases suggest drift without explicit stale markers
